Oct 20, 2010 - Prof. John Baras Gives Semi-plenary Lecture at NTNS2010 Professor John Baras , University of Maryland gave an invited semi-plenary lecture at the 19th International Symposium on the Mathematical Theory of Networks and Systems (MTNS201

thematical Theory of Networks and Systems (MTNS2010). MTNS traditionally covers areas involving a wide range of research directions in mathematical systems, networks and control theory, with emphasis on new challenges and potential applications.
sis on new challenges and potential applications. A prime objective of the MTNS 2010 Symposium is to explore and present mathematics as a key technology for the 21st century.
